markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 501. Certificate of Title Act
##### § 501.035 — Title for Former Military Vehicle

(a) Notwithstanding any other law, the department shall issue a title for a former military vehicle if all requirements for issuance of a title are met.

(b) In this section, “former military vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) .

*Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1079 (H.B.1755), Sec. 5, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other law, the department shall issue a title for a former military vehicle if all requirements for issuance of a title are met.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In this section, “former military vehicle” has the meaning assigned by Section 502.001 (Definitions) .
